title: Totem Axolotl
description: This resource pack replaces the regular totem with a axolotl!
body:
## ****"3D TotemAxolotl"**** is a resource pack that replaces the immortality totem with a 3D axolotl

![main image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cee6d3f7cfce30ccc2778b3dae745023a5ce3297.png)

> ###     What does it change?
>
> - Replaces the texture of the immortality totem with a 3D axolotl model.
> - Changes the sound of the Totem of Immortality to the sound of an Axolotl dying.
> - Supports all versions starting from 1.11

> ###       Important
>
> - This resource pack is not compatible with the [Small Totem Pop](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-totem-pop/), [Small Totem Pops](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-totem-pops/), [Small Totem Render](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-totem-render/), [Small Totem Overlay](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-totem-overlay/), [small totem pop1](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-totem-pop1) resource packs (model conflict)
